forgotPassword.heading: Reset your password.
forgotPassword.sentBody: The link expires in 1 hour. Check your spam folder if it doesn't arrive.
forgotPassword.sentSubtitle: If an account exists with that email, we've sent a secure reset link.
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter the email tied to your account and we'll send a secure reset link.
forgotPassword.title: Reset password

alreadySignedIn.closeTabHint: If this invite isn't meant for you, just close this tab — your session is unchanged.
alreadySignedIn.loginAsSomeoneElse: Or log in as someone else
alreadySignedIn.subtitle: Accepting this invite would replace your current session.
alreadySignedIn.title: You're already signed in.

invite.expiresInDays: Invite expires in {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}.
invite.heading: You've been invited.

accepted.body: This invite has already been used. If that was you, sign in with your password.
accepted.title: Already accepted.

expired.body: Invites are only valid for 7 days. Ask whoever invited you to send a fresh one.
expired.title: This invite has expired.

notFound.body: This link doesn't match any invite in our system. Double-check the URL or ask for a new invite.
notFound.title: Invite not found.

revoked.body: Whoever invited you has cancelled the invite. Ask them directly if this was a mistake.
revoked.title: This invite was revoked.

setPassword.heading: Create your password.
setPassword.subtitle: One last step — pick a password to finish setting up your account.
setPassword.title: Create your password

invite.subtitle: Set up your account and join your colleagues on {brand}.
invite.teamOwnerSuffix: — you can invite, edit and manage this team.
invite.termsAcceptance: By accepting, you agree to the <brand></brand> Terms and Privacy Policy.
invite.title: You've been invited

login.heading: Welcome back.
login.subtitle: Log in to manage your assignments and teams.
login.title: Log in

default.body: If you think that's wrong, reach out to your agency owner or email us at support@immo.app.
default.title: This section isn't available to your role.

admin.body: The admin console is only available to platform admins and support staff.
admin.title: Admin tools are restricted.

announcements.body: Only admins can create platform-wide announcements. You'll see any active ones in the dashboard automatically.
announcements.title: Announcements are managed by {brand}.

commissions.body: The org-wide commission dashboard is available to platform admins. You can still see your own team's commission configuration on your team's detail page.
commissions.title: Commission management is admin-only.

invite.body: Admins and realtor team-owners can invite people to the platform. If you think you should have access, ask your agency owner to transfer team ownership to you, or email us at support@immo.app.
invite.title: Inviting new users is restricted.

newAssignment.body: New assignments are created by the agency side — admin, staff, or realtor. Freelancers are assigned to inspections by the booking party, and those show up under Assignments once scheduled.
newAssignment.title: Creating assignments is not available for your role.

revenue.body: Org-wide revenue breakdowns are restricted to admin and staff. Your own team's delivered work shows on your team detail page.
revenue.title: Platform revenue reports are admin-only.

teams.body: The teams directory is used by agencies to manage their rosters. Freelancers work independently and don't belong to this view. You can still coordinate on assignments from the Assignments page.
teams.title: Team management is not available for your role.

users.body: The global users list is only available to platform admins and support staff. To add or remove teammates for your agency, use the Members tab on your team's detail page, or email us at support@immo.app.
users.title: Team administration is managed by {brand}.

register.heading: Create your agency account.
register.subtitle: Takes under 2 minutes. First assignment is on us.
register.title: Register

resetPassword.heading: Choose a new password.
resetPassword.missingTokenSubtitle: Open the reset link from your email, or request a new one.
resetPassword.subtitle: Use at least 10 characters. A mix of words, numbers and symbols is ideal.
resetPassword.title: Choose a new password

shell.headline: One dashboard for every certificate.
shell.lede: Order, schedule, track, and invoice every inspection — all from one place.

verifyEmail.checkInboxCardBody: It usually arrives within a minute. Check your spam folder if it doesn't show up.
verifyEmail.checkInboxCardTitle: The email is on its way
verifyEmail.checkInboxSubtitle: We just sent a verification link to your work email. Click it to activate your account.
verifyEmail.errorBody: Verification links expire after 24 hours and can only be used once. Sign in and request a fresh link from your settings.
verifyEmail.title: Verify email
verifyEmail.verifiedCardBody: Account notifications and password resets will now land at this address.
verifyEmail.verifiedSubtitle: {email} is now confirmed. You're all set.
